display.purpose: Homepage hero H1 and route H1s only. Space Grotesk, scrambled on reveal, capped under 5rem.

headline.purpose: Major section claims. Space Grotesk at 2.65rem.

title.purpose: Route cards, capability/process cards, and panel headings. Fira Code.

body.purpose: Primary reading text and service descriptions. Fira Code, held to 60-70ch.

label.purpose: Route prompts, metadata, chips, controls, and form labels. Uppercase Fira Code at 0 tracking.

shadows.name: inset-hairline
shadows.purpose: The only resting depth: a mint underglint at a panel's bottom edge. Flat by default.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Focused inputs and interactive elements, paired with a 2px mint outline. State feedback, not elevation.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Button, link, nav, and input state changes. Hover lift is translateY(-2px), not a shadow bloom.

motion.name: scroll-reveal
motion.purpose: CSS scroll-driven section reveals that enhance an already-visible default; gated behind @supports and reduced-motion.

motion.name: verification-sweep
motion.purpose: Slow diagnostic scan sweep on the contact and credibility panels only.

motion.name: verification-pulse
motion.purpose: Low-amplitude pulse for the credibility verification ring.

components.name: Primary Command Button
components.description: Main action for direct routes and proof panels. Flat mint-translucent fill with a chamfered notch.
components.css: .ds-button-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 3.25rem; padding: 0.9rem 1.15rem; border: 1px solid rgba(126, 255, 203, 0.38); border-radius: 0.12rem; clip-path: polygon(0 0, calc(100% - 0.6rem) 0, 100% 0.6rem, 100% 100%, 0 100%); background: rgba(126, 255, 203, 0.14); color: #f6fff8; font-family: 'Fira Code', ui-monospace, Menlo, Monaco, monospace; font-size: 0.92rem; letter-spacing: 0; transition: transform 180ms ease, border-color 180ms ease, background-color 180ms ease, color 180ms ease; } .ds-button-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); background: rgba(126, 255, 203, 0.2); } .ds-button-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(126, 255, 203, 0.72); outline-offset: 0.25rem; }

components.name: Secondary Route Button
components.description: Quiet secondary route for navigation-adjacent actions.
components.css: .ds-button-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 3.25rem; padding: 0.9rem 1.15rem; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); border-radius: 0.12rem; clip-path: polygon(0 0, calc(100% - 0.6rem) 0, 100% 0.6rem, 100% 100%, 0 100%); background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03); color: rgba(226, 247, 237, 0.86); font-family: 'Fira Code', ui-monospace, Menlo, Monaco, monospace; font-size: 0.92rem; letter-spacing: 0; transition: transform 180ms ease, border-color 180ms ease, background-color 180ms ease, color 180ms ease; } .ds-button-secondary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); color: #f6fff8; border-color: rgba(126, 255, 203, 0.22); } .ds-button-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(126, 255, 203, 0.72); outline-offset: 0.25rem; }

components.name: Terminal Panel
components.description: Default structural panel for services, proof, notes, and command content. Notched, flat, gradient depth.
components.html:
active module

Architecture

Expose weak points before scale turns them into cost.
components.css: .ds-terminal-panel { position: relative; isolation: isolate; display: grid; gap: 0.8rem; padding: 1.35rem; border: 1px solid rgba(126, 255, 203, 0.18); border-radius: 0.35rem; clip-path: polygon(0 0, calc(100% - 0.9rem) 0, 100% 0.9rem, 100% 100%, 0.9rem 100%, 0 calc(100% - 0.9rem)); background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(7, 18, 16, 0.98), rgba(1, 6, 5, 0.98)); box-shadow: inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(126, 255, 203, 0.08); color: #f4fff8; } .ds-terminal-panel::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(rgba(126, 255, 203, 0.18), rgba(126, 255, 203, 0.18)) left top / 2.5rem 1px no-repeat, linear-gradient(rgba(126, 255, 203, 0.18), rgba(126, 255, 203, 0.18)) right bottom / 2.5rem 1px no-repeat; opacity: 0.8; pointer-events: none; } .ds-terminal-panel > * { position: relative; z-index: 1; } .ds-card-label { color: #8ddfba; font: 400 0.72rem/1.2 'Fira Code', ui-monospace, Menlo, Monaco, monospace; letter-spacing: 0; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-card-title { color: #f4fff8; font: 400 1.2rem/1.4 'Fira Code', ui-monospace, Menlo, Monaco, monospace; letter-spacing: 0; } .ds-card-text { color: rgba(226, 247, 237, 0.86); font: 400 1rem/1.75 'Fira Code', ui-monospace, Menlo, Monaco, monospace; }

components.name: Terminal Input
components.description: Protected contact form field with label above and mint focus ring.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 0.45rem; color: #f4fff8; font-family: 'Fira Code', ui-monospace, Menlo, Monaco, monospace; } .ds-field-label { color: #8ddfba; font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 0; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-terminal-input { width: 100%; min-height: 7rem; padding: 0.85rem 0.95rem; border: 1px solid rgba(126, 255, 203, 0.12); border-radius: 0.12rem; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(11, 22, 20, 0.92), rgba(4, 11, 10, 0.98)), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02); color: #f4fff8; font: inherit; caret-color: #7effc6; resize: vertical; } .ds-terminal-input::placeholder { color: rgba(198, 225, 211, 0.72); } .ds-terminal-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: rgba(126, 255, 203, 0.36); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(126, 255, 203, 0.16); }

components.name: Navigation Chip
components.description: Primary nav item with notched chip geometry and a mint-translucent active state.
components.html: ServicesContact
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.75rem; font-family: 'Fira Code', ui-monospace, Menlo, Monaco, monospace; } .ds-nav-link { padding: 0.46rem 0.72rem; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0.16rem; clip-path: polygon(0 0, calc(100% - 0.45rem) 0, 100% 0.45rem, 100% 100%, 0 100%); color: rgba(232, 248, 239, 0.88); font-size: 0.8rem; letter-spacing: 0; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; transition: color 180ms ease, background-color 180ms ease, transform 180ms ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #f5fff8; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(126, 255, 203, 0.72); outline-offset: 0.25rem; } .ds-nav-link-active { border-color: rgba(126, 255, 203, 0.24); background: rgba(126, 255, 203, 0.1); color: #f5fff8; }

components.name: Signal Chip
components.description: Small metadata chip for status, tags, and route hints.
components.css: .ds-signal-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 2.1rem; padding: 0.45rem 0.8rem; border: 1px solid rgba(126, 255, 203, 0.12); border-radius: 0.12rem; clip-path: polygon(0 0, calc(100% - 0.45rem) 0, 100% 0.45rem, 100% 100%, 0 100%); background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03); color: rgba(226, 247, 237, 0.86); font: 400 0.72rem/1.2 'Fira Code', ui-monospace, Menlo, Monaco, monospace; letter-spacing: 0; text-transform: uppercase; }

narrative.overview:
This is a working diagnostic surface for a one-person technical operator, not an agency brochure. It runs on near-black teal depth, mint structural linework, and acid-lime command output, with Space Grotesk carrying decisive hierarchy over a Fira Code operator voice. The interface is allowed to read as technical because the service is technical, but the terminal identity exists to organize the client's decision, not to obscure it.

The signature structural move is the chamfered notch: panels, cards, buttons, inputs, and nav links are cut with a clip-path polygon on a near-sharp 0.35rem base radius. This is the brand's fingerprint. It is deliberately not soft, rounded, or pill-shaped. Depth is carried by dark vertical gradients, 1px low-alpha mint borders, inset hairlines, faint corner grid ticks, and scanlines, never by large drop shadows.

This system explicitly rejects generic agency polish, bloated SaaS landing-page patterns, vague innovation language, decorative case-study theater, and the anonymous-consultancy posture. It also rejects the warm-paper editorial AI default and the navy-and-gold fintech default: the brand lives only in black-green runtime space.
keyCharacteristics: Black-green operating surface (#020807) with mint diagnostic linework.
Chamfered-notch geometry on every panel, card, and control (not rounded, not pill).
Mono-forward voice (Fira Code) with Space Grotesk for client-facing hierarchy.
Flat by default: depth from gradient, hairline border, and notch, not shadow.
Motion that reads as booting, scanning, routing, verifying, or output, with reduced-motion fallbacks.
Direct accountability: operator name, direct email, no abstract company language.

rules.name: The Black Surface Rule
rules.body: The brand lives in black-green runtime space. Do not drift into navy SaaS, purple gradients, warm-paper editorial restraint, or generic dark-tech grey. If the background reads as anything but near-black teal, it is off-brand.

rules.name: The Mint Wire Rule
rules.body: Mint is structural and thin. 1px strokes, corner brackets, focus rings, scanlines, faint inset hairlines. Never a thick colored side-stripe, never a glow-heavy neon.

rules.name: The Command Accent Rule
rules.body: Lime (#d9ff8c) marks active output, command intent, and the single RZETELNA word in the credibility panel. Flat color only; no glow.

rules.name: The Credibility Containment Rule
rules.body: The lime RZETELNA accent and its panel corner brackets stay inside the credibility panel. Do not reuse that treatment on client logos, CTAs, or status elsewhere.

rules.name: The Operator Voice Rule
rules.body: Mono is allowed because the brand is a technical operator. Use Space Grotesk for hierarchy so the page reads as a business surface, not a terminal costume.

rules.name: The Plain-Tracking Label Rule
rules.body: Labels are uppercase mono at letter-spacing 0, not wide-tracked eyebrows. Do not reintroduce 0.18em tracked kickers above every section; that is the AI-scaffold tell this system avoids.

rules.name: The Clear Client Rule
rules.body: Technical labels can stay, but the copy around them must state business value in plain language: risk reduced, delivery cleaner, handoff durable.

rules.name: The Flat-Runtime Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. If you reach for a soft wide drop shadow (blur >= 16px) on a card or button, you are off-system. Use the gradient, the border, and the notch instead.

rules.name: The Lift-Is-Motion Rule
rules.body: Interactive lift is a 2px upward translateY on hover, not a shadow bloom. The element moves; it does not float.

dos: Do keep the black-green (#020807), mint (#7effc6), lime (#d9ff8c), mono-forward terminal identity.
Do apply the chamfered notch (clip-path polygon + 0.12-0.35rem radius) to every panel, card, and control; it is the brand's fingerprint.
Do build depth from gradient + 1px mint border + inset hairline + notch. Flat by default.
Do keep direct email and the operator name visible; the one-person model is a trust signal.
Do translate media, software, architecture, and audit work into clarity, risk reduction, execution, and durable handoff.
Do use selected collaborations and RZETELNA as evidence-bearing proof.
Do ship reduced-motion fallbacks for boot, scan, sweep, pulse, scramble, and scroll reveals.
Do keep body copy above 4.5:1 on the teal panels; bump toward #f4fff8 if a muted value is borderline.
donts: Don't use generic agency polish, bloated SaaS landing patterns, vague innovation language, or decorative case-study theater.
Don't make the site feel like a large anonymous consultancy or bury the operator behind abstract company language.
Don't let the terminal identity get so loud that clients cannot tell what is delivered.
Don't introduce rounded >=0.5rem cards or 999px pill buttons; the system is sharp + notched, not soft.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism as decoration, thick colored side-stripe borders, repeated identical icon cards, or the big-number hero-metric template.
Don't pair a 1px border with a soft wide drop shadow (blur >= 16px) on the same element (the ghost-card tell).
Don't add wide-tracked uppercase eyebrows above every section, or numbered 01 / 02 / 03 section markers as default scaffolding.
Don't spread the lime credibility accent or boot window-dot colors into unrelated UI.
Don't use em dashes anywhere in copy; use commas, colons, semicolons, periods, or parentheses.
Don't change URL structure, nav labels, form field names, logo treatment, or legal and credibility copy without explicit approval.
